data.title: Restyle Story as a cream non-house section + tokenize (single gold accent)

data.body: DESIGN DECISION (human): Story is NOT a house, so it should read distinctly — cream background, charcoal text, editorial calm — vs the color-flooded house pages. Collapse Story's 3 golds (#DFCA7A page bg, #8A7A20 deep accent, #D4BA58 nav/TalkCard) to ONE identity accent #D4BA58 (the only one legible on cream — that contrast problem is WHY the 3rd color existed). Background → cream, text stays charcoal. Tokenize as SECTIONS.story + --color-section-story, extend sync test. This is a LIVE visual redesign — orchestrator will show the result before merging; if the #D4BA58 FractalPattern reads too faint on cream, fall back to #8A7A20 for the pattern only.

Scope expanded: also carries the site-wide FractalPattern STACKING fix (the layer was -z-10 with no stacking context on <main>, so it painted behind the page bg and was invisible on all 8 pages — a pre-existing bug). Changed FractalPattern wrapper -z-10 to z-0. Folded here (vs a separate branch) because making the pattern render is part of getting Story right, and a separate branch hit .lattice/id cross-branch tangles. Story FractalPattern color also switched var()->real hex (var doesn't resolve in SVG attrs).

Cold review (independent sub-agent, fresh context): PASS. Highest-risk change (site-wide FractalPattern -z-10 to z-0) verified SAFE on all 8 pages — each wraps content in relative z-10, so the z-0 pattern cannot cover content. No raw golds (#DFCA7A/#8A7A20 gone; #D4BA58 only in houses.ts/index.css); Story text charcoal. var-vs-hex correct: SVG/JS get real hex (FractalPattern/Navbar/OctahedronHero/heroNavNodes use SECTIONS.story.accent), CSS contexts use var (btn-accent, SectorHeader inline style). section-sync non-vacuous for the single-accent story shape (mutation-tested). Gold band uses bg-section-story token (conformance-clean). Gates: typecheck/build/conformance pass; tests 7 failed/160 passed (7 = FRAC-199 set, no new). sector-header.test faithful; baseline shrank by exactly #8a7a20+#dfca7a. Human gave visual sign-off on /story. Non-blocking pre-existing note: TalkCard category label is gold small-text on cream (identical on master) - future WCAG ticket. Move to done.
